passiveAbilities.name: Slow
passiveAbilities.description: This model's Jog actions are limited to 2”.

passiveAbilities.name: Spirit Link
passiveAbilities.description: During the Replenish Step, this character gains +1 energy for each friendly slain character.

arcaneAbilities.name: Healing
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target restores X+1 Wds.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Rigor Mortis
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target discards all energy and suffers 1 Wd.
Catastrophe:  This model suffers 4 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Reanimate
arcaneAbilities.description:
Place a friendly slain model in base contact with this model. Restore half its health rounding up. It has no energy but may activate this turn.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 4 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Play Dead
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Enemy characters cannot target this model with actions until this model next performs an action or the end of turn, whichever comes first.
